One of the original settlers. Married to Saralla Sakurth
Born in Sembia. One of the original settlers. Married to Aisling Maeliticus. Died of natural causes.
One of the original settlers. Married to Alvund Alavandor. Possibly related to Alvund's previous wives Senthia and Abrecia Maeliticus
One of the original settlers. Possible relation to Claudius's second wive Sandara Sakurth.
Married Susserah Clandaral. Served as mayor; killed in a hunting accident.
Married Andarl Alavandor
Married Senthia Alavandor; lieutenant and soldier. Did five tours with the Sun Blades in the 3rd Company, Mountaineers.
Married Tergus Clarandal; appointed Mayor after Andarl was killed.
Married Xerces Alavaxi; died in hunting accident.
Married Coelathara Alavaxi; did 5 tours with the Sun Blades. Retired as a Sergeant from the 3rd Company, Mountaineers and later served as a Captain in the militia
